mapper.select:
SELECT t.id ,t.temp_security_name ,t.temp_security_code ,t.temp_security_market ,t.temp_security_type ,dst_temp.security_type_name AS tempSecurityTypeName ,t.temp_mitigation_code ,t.temp_company_id ,t.temp_company_name_snapshot ,t.temp_issue_date ,t.temp_maturity_date ,t.security_name ,t.security_code ,t.security_market ,t.security_type ,dst.security_type_name ,t.update_time ,t.status ,t.operation_type ,t.crte_time ,t.updt_time FROM rrs_temp_security_code t LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst_temp ON dst_temp.security_type = t.temp_security_type AND dst_temp.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = t.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0
AND t.temp_security_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tempSecurityCode}, '%')
AND t.temp_security_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tempSecurityName}, '%')
ORDER BY t.crte_time DESC ,t.id DESC

SELECT id ,temp_security_name ,temp_security_code ,temp_security_market ,temp_security_type ,temp_mitigation_code ,temp_company_id ,temp_company_name_snapshot ,temp_issue_date ,temp_maturity_date ,security_name ,security_code ,security_market ,security_type ,update_time ,status ,operation_type ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time FROM rrs_temp_security_code WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT t.id ,t.temp_security_name ,t.temp_security_code ,t.temp_security_market ,t.temp_security_type ,dst_temp.security_type_name AS tempSecurityTypeName ,t.temp_mitigation_code ,t.temp_company_id ,t.temp_company_name_snapshot ,t.temp_issue_date ,t.temp_maturity_date ,t.security_name ,t.security_code ,t.security_market ,t.security_type ,dst.security_type_name ,t.update_time ,t.status ,t.operation_type ,t.crte_time ,t.updt_time FROM rrs_temp_security_code t LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst_temp ON dst_temp.security_type = t.temp_security_type AND dst_temp.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = t.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rrs_temp_security_code WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status IN ('temporary', 'updated') AND security_code = #{securityCode}

SELECT id AS companyId ,code AS companyCode ,full_name ,short_name FROM ais_inv_analysis.t_inv_company
AND id = #{tempCompanyId}
AND (full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tempSecurityName}, '%') OR short_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tempSecurityName}, '%'))
ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 100
SELECT id AS companyId ,code AS companyCode ,full_name ,short_name FROM ais_inv_analysis.t_inv_company WHERE id = #{companyId} LIMIT 1

SELECT security_type ,security_type_name ,category_type ,category_type_name FROM dict_security_type WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND category_type != 'company' ORDER BY category_type ASC ,sort_order ASC ,id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM dict_security_type WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND security_type = #{securityType}
